title: Google I/O 2025 – 6eTiMIhtnBA
text: Hello, welcome to this session about Gemini Cloud Assist. My name is Leanit. I'm a developer relations engineer at Google Cloud. Today I'm going to review the new capabilities of Gemini Cloud Assist that were announced during Cloud Next. Let me start with a short overview of what is new and then move to realtime demonstration of the new products. Some of the products that you will see are in preview but available to all Google Cloud users. I encourage you to try them in your respective environments. Google Cloud manages resources and projects. Any resource that you create like a virtual machine or a service account belongs to a single project. This traditional resource centric approach introduces a large amount of complexity to application design, deployment and management. It is especially hard when applications cross project boundaries. This forces application and platform developers to translate application design into low-level infrastructure architectures. Operators are faced with additional challenges when they need to troubleshoot application functions going through the maze of cloud infrastructures in search for the application's footprint. Other tasks such as capacity planning or cost optimization also require continuous translation between application business model and cloud resources. Recognizing these challenges, Google has been placing AI at the center of your Google Cloud experience. By today, you have been seeing Gemini across multiple areas of Google Cloud. To improve application management and operations, Google Cloud leverages Gemini's state-of-the-art models to help you perform application life cycle tasks. This assistance is focused on three areas. Design operations and optimization of your applications. I'll demonstrate how Gemini helps to manage applications related tasks in the demo. Let's zoom in into these three areas of the application life cycle. When doing design, we need to answer many questions. What is the right services required to run the application? How should the services
